Ground tissue - collenchyma
cells very elongate

Ground tissue - sclerenchyma
structural support - stems
thick 1° and 2° walls
reinforced with lignin
typically dead at maturity
fiber cells – very elongate
sclerids - stone cells, seed coats

Ground tissue - parenchyma
thin, flexible 1° wall, no 2° wall
most metabolic functions, photosynthesis
storage in roots, stems
